languages.text: {n}Вопреки ожиданию, Батошски понимающе кивает.{/n} "Деловой разговор, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Как бы ни была сильна ваша свита, моих солдат больше. И все они положат жизнь, если вы решитесь меня убить. Я точно заберу парочку ваших, прежде чем обрету искупление. У вас, наверное, в небесах есть еще люди, но до них вам не докричаться, как я понял".

traits.locale_text: {n}Вопреки ожиданию, Батошски никак не выказывает испуга или напряжения.{/n} "Деловой разговор, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Вы могли бы так сделать, будь у вас связь, чтобы призвать подкрепление. А в нынешнем составе, как бы ни была сильна ваша свита, моих солдат больше. И все они положат жизнь, если вы решитесь меня убить. Ну и я точно заберу парочку ваших, прежде чем обрету искупление".

languages.text: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."
languages.original_text: {n}Вопреки ожиданию, Батошски понимающе кивает.{/n} "Деловой разговор, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Как бы ни была сильна ваша свита, моих солдат больше. И все они положат жизнь, если вы решитесь меня убить. Я точно заберу парочку ваших, прежде чем обрету искупление. У вас, наверное, в небесах есть еще люди, но до них вам не докричаться, как я понял".

traits.locale_text: {n}Contrary to expectation, Batoshski gives a knowing nod.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will give their life if you decide to kill me. I'll certainly take a couple of yours with me before I find my redemption. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

{n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

languages.text: {n}Wider Erwarten nickt Batoshski verständnisvoll.{/n} "Klartext, {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Egal, wie stark Euer Gefolge auch sein mag, meine Soldaten sind in der Überzahl. Und jeder einzelne von ihnen wird sein Leben opfern, falls Ihr beschließt, mich zu töten. Ich werde definitiv einige Eurer Leute mitnehmen, ehe ich Erlösung finde. Ihr habt am Himmel vermutlich noch mehr Leute, aber so wie ich das sehe, sind sie für Euch unerreichbar."
languages.original_text: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

traits.locale_text: {n}Wider Erwarten nickt Batoshski verständnisvoll.{/n} "Klartext, {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Egal, wie stark Euer Gefolge auch sein mag, meine Soldaten sind in der Überzahl. Und jeder einzelne von ihnen wird sein Leben opfern, falls Ihr beschließt, mich zu töten. Ich werde definitiv einige Eurer Leute mitnehmen, ehe ich Erlösung finde. Ihr habt am Himmel vermutlich noch mehr Leute, aber so wie ich das sehe, sind sie für Euch unerreichbar."

languages.text: {n}Contre toute attente, Batoshski acquiesce d'un air compréhensif.{/n} « Voilà qui a le mérite d'être franc, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Cependant, si redoutable soit votre entourage, mes soldats sont bien plus nombreux. Et chacun d'entre eux est prêt à sacrifier sa vie si vous décidez de me tuer. Moi-même, j'emporterai quelques-uns des vôtres dans la tombe avant de trouver la rédemption. Vous avez probablement des renforts en orbite, mais pour l'heure, vous n'avez aucun moyen de les contacter. »
languages.original_text: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

traits.locale_text: {n}Contre toute attente, Batoshski acquiesce d'un air compréhensif.{/n} « Voilà qui a le mérite d'être franc, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Cependant, si redoutable soit votre entourage, mes soldats sont bien plus nombreux. Et chacun d'entre eux est prêt à sacrifier sa vie si vous décidez de me tuer. Moi-même, j'emporterai quelques-uns des vôtres dans la tombe avant de trouver la rédemption. Vous avez probablement des renforts en orbite, mais pour l'heure, vous n'avez aucun moyen de les contacter. »

languages.text: {n}Contra toda expectativa, Batoshski se muestra comprensivo y asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «No me andaré con rodeos, {mf|lord heredero|lady heredera}. Por poderoso que sea su séquito, mis soldados los superan en número. Y hasta el último de ellos daría la vida por mí si usted decidiese matarme. Yo mismo me llevaría por delante a un par de los suyos antes de hallar mi expiación. Seguramente disponga de más efectivos allí en el cielo, pero tal y como yo lo veo, ahora mismo están fuera de su alcance».
languages.original_text: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

traits.locale_text: {n}Contra toda expectativa, Batoshski se muestra comprensivo y asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «No me andaré con rodeos, {mf|lord heredero|lady heredera}. Por poderoso que sea su séquito, mis soldados los superan en número. Y hasta el último de ellos daría la vida por mí si usted decidiese matarme. Yo mismo me llevaría por delante a un par de los suyos antes de hallar mi expiación. Seguramente disponga de más efectivos allí en el cielo, pero tal y como yo lo veo, ahora mismo están fuera de su alcance».

languages.text: {n}Beklentilerin aksine Batoshski, anlayışla başını sallıyor.{/n} "Açık konuşalım {mf|lord|leydi} vâris. Maiyetiniz ne kadar güçlü olursa olsun, askerlerimin sayısı onları aşıyor. Beni öldürmeye karar verirseniz her biri canını ortaya koyar. Kefaretimi ödemeden önce sizinkilerden birkaçını da yanımda götürürüm. Muhtemelen yukarıda daha fazla adamınız vardır ancak anladığım kadarıyla ulaşamayacağınız kadar uzaktalar."
languages.original_text: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

traits.locale_text: {n}Beklentilerin aksine Batoshski, anlayışla başını sallıyor.{/n} "Açık konuşalım {mf|lord|leydi} vâris. Maiyetiniz ne kadar güçlü olursa olsun, askerlerimin sayısı onları aşıyor. Beni öldürmeye karar verirseniz her biri canını ortaya koyar. Kefaretimi ödemeden önce sizinkilerden birkaçını da yanımda götürürüm. Muhtemelen yukarıda daha fazla adamınız vardır ancak anladığım kadarıyla ulaşamayacağınız kadar uzaktalar."

languages.text: {n}出乎意料的是，巴托什斯基点了点头，表示理解。{/n}“我说点实在的，继承人大人。不管您的随从多强悍，在人数上都比不过我的士兵。如果您要取我性命，他们每一个人都会为我豁出命来。而我在去赎罪之前，肯定会捎上您的几个随从。您在飞船里可能还有更多人手，但据我所知，您联系不上他们。”
languages.original_text: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

traits.locale_text: {n}出乎意料的是，巴托什斯基点了点头，表示理解。{/n}“我说点实在的，继承人大人。不管您的随从多强悍，在人数上都比不过我的士兵。如果您要取我性命，他们每一个人都会为我豁出命来。而我在去赎罪之前，肯定会捎上您的几个随从。您在飞船里可能还有更多人手，但据我所知，您联系不上他们。”

languages.text: {n}予想に反して、バトシュスキーは理解を示すように頷いた。{/n}「率直な話、{mf|卿|女卿}。あなたの側近がどれだけ強固であっても、私の兵は彼らを上回る。そして、あなたが私を殺す決断をすれば、私の兵は一人一人が命を落とすだろう。私は必ず、贖罪を果たす前に、あなた方の兵士を二人ほど連れて行くだろう。あなた方の兵士は空にたくさんいるだろうが、私の理解では、彼らには遠く及ばない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."

traits.locale_text: {n}予想に反して、バトシュスキーは理解を示すように頷いた。{/n}「率直な話、{mf|卿|女卿}。あなたの側近がどれだけ強固であっても、私の兵は彼らを上回る。そして、あなたが私を殺す決断をすれば、私の兵は一人一人が命を落とすだろう。私は必ず、贖罪を果たす前に、あなた方の兵士を二人ほど連れて行くだろう。あなた方の兵士は空にたくさんいるだろうが、私の理解では、彼らには遠く及ばない。」
